title: Vehicle Identification Number
possible_causes: Vehicle Identification Number fault.
Control module configuration, VIN data, power supply, ground, relay, ignition input, retained accessory power, wiring, connector, or related module influence may be involved depending on the vehicle.
Circuit names, connector pins, thresholds, wake/sleep states, and initialization procedures are vehicle-specific and must be confirmed in official service information.
check_order: Save all-module DTCs, freeze-frame data, module part numbers, configuration/VIN data, battery voltage, ignition state, wake/sleep state, and related power, ground, or communication DTCs.

Confirm vehicle-specific module configuration, VIN learning, power distribution, relay control, ignition input logic, retained accessory power behavior, and diagnostic prerequisites in the manufacturer service manual or OEM service system.
Inspect battery condition, charging voltage, module power feeds, grounds, relays, fuses, connectors, harness condition, and network-related DTCs before replacing modules.
Separate configuration/VIN mismatch, low or unstable supply voltage, relay/input circuit fault, ground fault, wake/sleep logic issue, and module fault causes using the manufacturer procedure.
common_mistakes: Replacing a module before checking battery support, power feeds, grounds, relays, ignition inputs, and configuration data.
Assuming connector terminals, wake/sleep states, voltage thresholds, or VIN procedures are common across vehicles.
Clearing or programming modules without saving the pre-repair scan, configuration data, and recovery information.
required_tools: Power distribution and network diagnostic tools
safety_notes: Use strong caution around high-voltage, SRS/restraints, brake, steering, fuel, ignition, charging, and programming/coding related systems; unstable power or incorrect configuration can disable safety-critical modules, so follow OEM disable, support, initialization, and recovery procedures.
source: SAE J2012 / SAE J2012DA generic DTC definitions and Autel official DTC table based diagnostic guidance
